name: Cameco Corporation
description: Cameco Corporation is the world's largest publicly traded uranium company, headquartered in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Canada. The company operates the McArthur River-Key Lake and Cigar Lake uranium mines in Saskatchewan — the world's largest and highest-grade uranium mines respectively — and holds a 40% stake in the Inkai in-situ recovery mine in Kazakhstan. Cameco also holds ownership interests in Westinghouse Electric Company and Global Laser Enrichment.
